option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/bg_wood_overlay" android:fillViewport="true">
<GridLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:columnCount="2" android:padding="12dp" android:useDefaultMargins="false">
<!-- Quick Tips 1 --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardTips1" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="#FFFFFF" android:paddingBottom="12dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="130dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:padding="16dp" android:src="@drawable/qt" android:background="#EBEBEB" android:contentDescription="Quick Tips 1"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quick tips 1" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#1A1A1A" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Quick Tips 2 --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardTips2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="#FFFFFF" android:paddingBottom="12dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="130dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:padding="16dp" android:src="@drawable/qt" android:background="#EBEBEB" android:contentDescription="Quick Tips 2"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quick tips 2" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#1A1A1A" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Quick Tips 3 --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardTips3" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="#FFFFFF" android:paddingBottom="12dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="130dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:padding="16dp" android:src="@drawable/qt" android:background="#EBEBEB" android:contentDescription="Quick Tips 3"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quick tips 3" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#1A1A1A" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Quick Tips 4 --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardTips4" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="#FFFFFF" android:paddingBottom="12dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="130dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:padding="16dp" android:src="@drawable/qt" android:background="#EBEBEB" android:contentDescription="Quick Tips 4"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quick tips 4" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#1A1A1A" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
</GridLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/bg_wood_overlay">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvQuickTips" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="12dp" android:clipToPadding="false" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTipsEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="Tidak ada tips." android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="#1A1A1A" android:visibility="gone" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressTips" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" />
</FrameLayout>
